creator: wjw@digiware.nl
text:
(In reply to Steve Wills from comment #1)
I noticed that you are trying to compile this with Clang 6.0.
And I'm pretty certain that that is not going to work.
Had the same problem when running on 12.0, which also does not have clang 8.0

So I guess that I'll have to specify some options to get 8.0.

Going to dig some more the the porters manual.

But compilation on the non-matching problems has just gotten a LOT longer.
